descriptionEn: Father of Joseph in the line of our Lord's ancestry (Luke 3:23).

verses.line: And Jesus himself began to be about thirty years of age, being (as was supposed) the son of Joseph, which was the son of Heli,

images.caption: And Jesus himself began to be about thirty years of age, being (as was supposed) the son of Joseph, which was the son of Heli, (Luke 3:23)
